note: Universal (character-independent) HP/MP baseline at each checkpoint level, without Esper level-up bonuses. A character's total HP/MP at a level = this baseline + that character's hp/mp bonus (see characters.json). MP curve matches the JP/Pixel-Remaster progression (max 989 at Lv99; the SNES-NA curve maxes at 961).
source: Stat-by-level baseline cross-checked against Gamer Corner Guides (guides.gamercorner.net/ffvi/levels) and kwhazit FF6 mechanics; anchors verified: baseline HP is 173 at Lv10 and 5050 at Lv60.
